zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Bohun於大約1326年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Sir John DeBohun I26歲，母親Isabel de Tregoz25歲。她於大約1341年與John de Lisle在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1349年7月在她的家鄉享年24歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Bohun于大约1326年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Sir John DeBohun I26岁，母亲Isabel de Tregoz25岁。她于大约1341年与John de Lisle在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1349年7月在她的家乡享年24岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Slovak (Behúň) and Rusyn (from Slovakia; also Behún): nickname from Slovak behúň (Rusyn bihun) ‘fast runner’.
Irish: from Ó Beachain or Ó Beathain, see Behan . This form of the surname is almost extinct in Britain.

variants.name: Behan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Conan, Aileen.
Irish (southern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Beachain ‘descendant of Beachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of beach ‘bee’.
Irish (southern): perhaps from Ó Beathain ‘descendant of Beathán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of beatha ‘life’. Compare Bean 5 and McBeth .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Bohun was born about 1326, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John DeBohun I, was 26 and her mother, Isabel de Tregoz, was 25. She married John de Lisle about 1341, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in July 1349, in her hometown, at the age of 24.

Elle a épousé John de Lisle environ 1341, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en juillet 1349, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 24 ans.

Sie hat um 1341 in England, United Kingdom John de Lisle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Juli 1349 im Alter von 24 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Bohun(이)가 대략 1326년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John DeBohun I(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Tregoz(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1341년 영국 잉글랜드에서 John de Lisle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 7월 그녀의 고향에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.
